1: The LORD LORD will deliver him in time of trouble.
2: And thou wilt not deliver him unto the will of his enemies.
3: Thou wilt make all his bed in his sickness.
4: Heal my soul; for I have sinned against thee.
5: When shall he die, and his name perish?
6: His heart gathereth iniquity to itself; When When he goeth abroad, he telleth it it .
7: Against me do they devise my hurt.
8: And now now that he lieth he shall rise up no more.
9: Which did eat of my bread, hath lifted up his his heel against me.
10: And raise me up, that I may requite them.
11: Because mine enemy doth not triumph over me.
12: And settest me before thy face for ever.
13: From everlasting, and to everlasting. Amen, and Amen.
